zh.lifeSummary: 當Elsberg Seclis於大約1030年出生時，她的父親Gérard de Rollancourt-Hesdin-4歲，母親Clotilde De Canlers-17歲。她於大約1078年與Gerard de Bournonville在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯洛藍古特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1112年在法國崔-瓦爾 德 洛易洛易特奧爾萊安斯享年83歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elsberg Seclis于大约1030年出生时，她的父亲Gérard de Rollancourt-Hesdin-4岁，母亲Clotilde De Canlers-17岁。她于大约1078年与Gerard de Bournonville在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯洛藍古特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1112年在法国崔-瓦爾 德 洛易洛易特奧爾萊安斯享年83岁。

nameMeanings.name: Seclis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Sales
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Efren, Alberto, Francisco, Manuel, Camilo, Carlos, Fernando, Juan, Juanita, Mario, Ofelia.

English: variant of Sale with plural or post-medieval excrescent -s. The Middle English plural form was probably often in variation with the singular form. The surname is uncommon in southwestern England but may derive there from Zeals (Wiltshire), and also from the plural form of Old English sealh ‘willow’; see Seal .
Catalan, Spanish, and French (Occitan): habitational name from any of the places called Sales, like Sales de Llierca (Catalonia), from the plural of   Sala   1. Compare   De Sales  .

nameMeanings.name: Elsberg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Symcha.  Russian Grigory, Mikhail.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): artificial name from German Ölberg ‘olive mountain’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elsberg Seclis was born about 1030, her father, Gérard de Rollancourt-Hesdin, was -4 and her mother, Clotilde De Canlers, was -17. She married Gerard de Bournonville about 1078, in Rollancourt, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1112, in Orléans, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, France, at the age of 83.

ko.Orléans, Loiret, France: 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 로이렛 올를e아스
ko.lifeSummary: Elsberg Seclis(이)가 대략 1030년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gérard de Rollancourt-Hesdin(은)는 -4세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Clotilde De Canlers(은)는 -17세였다. 그녀는 대략 1078년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 롤랭쿠르트에서 Gerard de Bournonville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1112년 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 로이렛 올를e아스에서 83세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Orléans, Loiret, France: орлeанс, лоирет, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elsberg Seclis родилась около 1030 г., её отцу по имени Gérard de Rollancourt-Hesdin было -4 год, а матери, которую звали Clotilde De Canlers, -17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gerard de Bournonville около 1078 г. в местности ролланкоурт, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1112 г. в местности орлeанс, лоирет, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция в возрасте 83 лет.
